title: GET /api/v1/instance and GET /api/v2/instance
description: Implement instance metadata endpoints. v1 and v2 have different shapes — clients prefer v2 but fall back to v1. Includes: uri, title, description, version (report '4.0.0' for max client compat), email (contact), max_toot_chars, thumbnail, languages, configuration object with limits.
design: Report version as '4.0.0' even though we are not Mastodon — clients use this to gate features. configuration.statuses.max_characters from config. configuration.media_attachments.supported_mime_types lists image types only (no video). openRegistrations: false.
acceptance_criteria: Ivory reads instance info on login; max_toot_chars matches config; version string is '4.0.0' or similar to maximize client compat; v1 and v2 both return correct shapes; thumbnail returns null if not configured
